response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth with experience in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent infrastructure, which aligns well with the role's requirements. His background in staff-level roles, multi-language expertise, and operational ownership (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD) is highly relevant. However, his recent staff role is very new (since April 2025), and his experience with Python is not explicitly highlighted, which are minor concerns for this senior-level position.
strengths: Deep experience in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, event-driven GISCollective platform)
Strong operational ownership and incident-response capability (e.g., CI/CD pipelines, dev-ops infrastructure at Altom Consulting)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited explicit Python expertise, which is a must-have technical skill for this role
Recent staff role (since April 2025) may not reflect long-term suitability for the position
Background in AI-native engineering is present but not extensive (focused more on AI-agent infrastructure than LLM/ML products)
